description: Immerse yourself in the enchanting world of Oxford, a city steeped in history and culture, where the echoes of scholars and the charm of cobblestone streets beckon. Over four days, you and your partner will explore the magical realms of Harry Potter, indulge in delightful shopping, and savor the rich heritage of this iconic university town. From the bustling markets to the serene gardens, every moment in Oxford will be a treasure trove of experiences, perfect for any couple looking to deepen their connection amidst the backdrop of timeless beauty.

activities.activity: Breakfast at The Handle Bar Cafe
activities.description: Start your day with a hearty breakfast at The Handle Bar Cafe, known for its locally sourced ingredients and delicious brunch options. Try their famous full English breakfast or a lighter option like avocado toast.

activities.activity: Visit the Bodleian Library
activities.description: Explore one of the oldest libraries in Europe, the Bodleian Library. Take a guided tour to learn about its rich history and see the stunning architecture. Don't forget to check out the Divinity School, a filming location for Harry Potter!

activities.activity: Lunch at The Eagle and Child
activities.description: Enjoy lunch at The Eagle and Child, a historic pub frequented by J.R.R. Tolkien and C.S. Lewis. Savor traditional British fare in a cozy atmosphere, perfect for a literary-themed meal.

activities.activity: Explore Radcliffe Camera
activities.description: After lunch, take a stroll to the Radcliffe Camera, an iconic building in Oxford. Its stunning dome and beautiful surroundings make it a perfect spot for photos and a quick rest.

activities.activity: Shopping for Harry Potter Merchandise at The Harry Potter Shop at Platform 9¾
activities.description: Head to The Harry Potter Shop at Platform 9¾ to find a wide range of merchandise, from wands to clothing. It's a must-visit for any Harry Potter fan looking to take home a piece of magic!
activities.searchQuery: The Harry Potter Shop at Platform 9¾

activities.activity: Visit Christ Church College
activities.description: Explore Christ Church College, known for its stunning architecture and as a filming location for the Harry Potter movies. Don't miss the Great Hall, which inspired the Hogwarts dining hall!

activities.activity: Dinner at The Old Tom
activities.description: End your day with dinner at The Old Tom, a charming pub offering a selection of local ales and hearty dishes. It's a great place to relax and reflect on your day of exploring.

activities.activity: Breakfast at The Handle Bar Cafe
activities.description: Start your day with a hearty breakfast at this cozy cafe known for its locally sourced ingredients and delicious options. Try their famous pancakes or a classic English breakfast to fuel up for a day of adventure!

activities.activity: Visit Christ Church College
activities.description: Explore the stunning Christ Church College, which served as inspiration for the Harry Potter films. Don't miss the Great Hall, which resembles Hogwarts' dining hall, and the beautiful gardens that surround the college.

activities.activity: Explore The Great Hall
activities.description: Step into the iconic Great Hall, where you can admire the long tables and the enchanting atmosphere that inspired the Harry Potter series. Take plenty of photos to capture this magical moment!

activities.activity: Lunch at The Eagle and Child
activities.description: Enjoy lunch at the historic pub where J.R.R. Tolkien and C.S. Lewis used to meet. Savor traditional British fare in a charming setting that feels like stepping back in time.

activities.activity: The Harry Potter Shop at Platform 9¾
activities.description: Head to the Harry Potter Shop at Platform 9¾ to find the perfect souvenirs and merchandise. From wands to house scarves, this shop is a must-visit for any Harry Potter fan!
activities.searchQuery: The Harry Potter Shop at Platform 9¾

activities.activity: Shopping at Bicester Village
activities.description: Take a short trip to Bicester Village, an outlet shopping destination where you can find designer brands at discounted prices. Perfect for picking up some stylish clothing and accessories!

activities.activity: Dinner at The Old Bookbinders Ale House
activities.description: End your day with a cozy dinner at this charming pub, known for its warm atmosphere and delicious food. Try their homemade pies or fish and chips for a true British experience.

activities.activity: Breakfast at The Handle Bar Cafe
activities.description: Start your day with a hearty breakfast at this cozy cafe known for its locally sourced ingredients and delicious brunch options. Try their famous full English breakfast for a true taste of Oxford!

activities.activity: Visit the Covered Market
activities.description: Explore the historic Covered Market, a vibrant hub of local produce, artisan goods, and unique shops. It's the perfect place to find Harry Potter merchandise and other quirky souvenirs.

activities.activity: Lunch at The Eagle and Child
activities.description: Enjoy lunch at this iconic pub, famously frequented by J.R.R. Tolkien and C.S. Lewis. The atmosphere is rich with literary history, and the pub serves traditional British fare.

activities.activity: Explore the Ashmolean Museum
activities.description: Dive into the world of art and archaeology at the Ashmolean Museum, the oldest public museum in the UK. Don't miss the Egyptian mummies and the stunning collection of Pre-Raphaelite art.

activities.activity: Visit Oxford Castle and Prison
activities.description: Take a guided tour of the historic Oxford Castle, where you can learn about its fascinating history and even climb the tower for panoramic views of the city. A great way to immerse yourself in Oxford's rich past!

activities.activity: Shopping for Harry Potter Merchandise at The Wizarding World
activities.description: Head to The Wizarding World shop to find a variety of Harry Potter-themed merchandise, from wands to clothing. It's a must-visit for any fan looking to take home a piece of the magic!

activities.activity: Dinner at The Old Tom
activities.description: End your day with dinner at The Old Tom, a charming pub that offers a cozy atmosphere and a menu filled with hearty dishes. It's a great spot to relax and reflect on your day in Oxford.

transit.memo: Travel from Oxford to London Heathrow Airport for your flight.

activities.activity: Breakfast at The Handle Bar Cafe & Kitchen
activities.description: Start your day with a hearty breakfast at this cozy cafe known for its locally sourced ingredients and delicious options. Try their famous pancakes or a traditional English breakfast to fuel up for the day ahead.

activities.activity: Visit the University Parks
activities.description: Stroll through the beautiful University Parks, a perfect spot for a morning walk. Enjoy the serene landscapes, picturesque ponds, and perhaps spot some local wildlife. It's a lovely way to soak in the atmosphere of Oxford before heading to your next destination.

activities.activity: Explore the Sheldonian Theatre
activities.description: Visit the iconic Sheldonian Theatre, designed by Sir Christopher Wren. Take a guided tour to learn about its history and architecture, and if you're lucky, catch a glimpse of a performance or event happening during your visit.

activities.activity: Lunch at The Eagle and Child
activities.description: Enjoy lunch at this historic pub, famously frequented by J.R.R. Tolkien and C.S. Lewis. Savor traditional British fare in a charming atmosphere, and don't forget to try their local ales.

activities.activity: Visit the Harry Potter Studio Tour
activities.description: Take a magical journey to the Warner Bros. Studio Tour in Leavesden, where you can explore the sets, props, and costumes from the Harry Potter films. This immersive experience is a must for any fan!

activities.activity: Shopping for Harry Potter Merchandise at the Studio Shop
activities.description: Before you leave, make sure to visit the Studio Shop for exclusive Harry Potter merchandise. From wands to clothing, you'll find the perfect souvenirs to take home.

activities.activity: Dinner at The Plough
activities.description: End your day with a relaxing dinner at The Plough, a traditional pub offering a cozy atmosphere and a menu filled with hearty dishes. It's a great place to unwind after a day of exploring.
